use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING ANDROGEN RESPONSIVE/MEDIATED CONDITION IN MAMMAL BY ADMIN A SAFE, EFFECTIVE AMOUNT OF DUTASTERIDE OR PHARMACEUTICALLY ACCEPTABLE DERIVATIVE THEREOF..CONDITIONS INCLUDE BENIGN PROSTATIC HYPERTROPHY
